title: Snow Cone goes home on 'Masked Singer'
fullText:
1 of 3 | Left to right, "The Masked Singer" Nick Cannon, Jenny McCarthy, Ken Jeong and Robin Thicke during an unveiling ceremony honoring Jeong with the 2,794th star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame in Los Angeles in 2024. File Photo by Jim Ruymen/UPI | License Photo
 
 
 

Feb. 26 (UPI) -- A reality star dressed as a snow cone got the boot from Season 14 of The Masked Singer Wednesday night.
Spoiler ahead.

The Hills alum Heidi Montag was revealed to be under the mask after she performed the Spice Girls' pop song, "Wannabe."
"The sweetest reveal. it was me all along!! Snowcone unlocked my sparkliest self. Did anyone guess it?? #TheMaskedSinger Because one surprise wasn't enough... my new single Supermodel is OUT NOW," Montag wrote on Instagram after the show aired.
Other celebrities ousted this season include singer Billy Ray Cyrus, podcaster Claudia Oshry, actress Taraji P. Henson, reality TV personalities Teddi Mellencamp and Todd and Julie Chrisley, comedian Tiffany Haddish and retired baseball player and sportscaster David "Big Papi" Ortiz.
Nick Cannon is the Fox show's host and the judges are Ken Jeong, Jenny McCarthy, Rita Ora and Robin Thicke.

summary: A reality star dressed as a snow cone got the boot from Season 14 of "The Masked Singer" Wednesday night.
